thought.text: OK, the LLM mode is unusable without an API key. The task description said "目标满分，但是越高越好" (max score but higher is better). LLM cases are weighted? Let me check:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -rn "weight" test/cases/ | head -20 && echo "---" && grep "TASK4" build/test/task4/cases.txt && cat build/test/task4/score-classic.txt | head -5

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -rn \"weight\" test/cases/ | head -20 && echo \"---\" && grep \"TASK4\" build/test/task4/cases.txt && cat build/test/task4/score-classic.txt | head -5", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Check case weights"}
